## Summary
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup (no behavior change)

## Related issue
Fixes #(issue number) — or "N/A"

## Testing
Smoke test checklist (from CONTRIBUTING.md):
- [ ] Popup paste works
- [ ] Keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+Shift+1) works
- [ ] Slash command (`/x + space`) works in input, textarea, contentEditable
- [ ] Placeholder modal works
- [ ] Options page CRUD works
- [ ] Both Chromium and Firefox builds load without errors

## Philosophy compliance
- [ ] No new npm/CDN dependencies
- [ ] No build step / transpilation added
- [ ] No external network calls
- [ ] All new user-facing strings have entries in both `_locales/en/messages.json` and `_locales/tr/messages.json`

## Changelog
- [ ] Added an entry under `## [Unreleased]` in `CHANGELOG.md`
